assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 14: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches claude-md-configured.md line 16 exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 15: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row added with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)

Jira Configuration marked 'Preserved — no changes' (line 20). Bug Configuration marked 'Preserved — no changes' (line 42). Code Intelligence has 'Preserved:' entries and '**Added**:' entries (lines 37-39).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 22-24 show a table: serena_backend 'Already in Registry?' = 'Yes', serena_ui 'Already in Registry?' = 'No'. Line 26: '**New instance found: `serena_ui`**'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-40 preserve the naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol), and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). Only line 41 ('`serena_ui`: No known limitations') is newly added.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 44-47: '## Bug Configuration' with 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — matches original exactly. discovery-log.md line 70: 'Bug Configuration is up to date. All three required fields are populated'. changes-log.md line 42: 'Preserved — no changes'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 74: 'Security Configuration does not exist. User was asked whether to enable security triage. User declined. Skipping Security Configuration.' changes-log.md lines 55-57: 'Security Configuration — Not added — user declined when asked whether to enable security triage.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 48 with Bug Configuration).
